## Summary

Describe the public artifact, schema, tool, or documentation change.

## Safety Boundary

- [ ] No patient-identifying data
- [ ] No private records, portal exports, credentials, or restricted data
- [ ] No patient-specific medical interpretation
- [ ] No diagnostic, treatment, or trial recommendation
- [ ] No unsupported cure or vaccine claim
- [ ] Public-facing pages or major artifacts keep the `frg.earth` stewardship mark where appropriate

## Provenance

- Source IDs:
- PMIDs, URLs, registry IDs, or regulatory anchors:
- Linked claim IDs, gap IDs, extraction record IDs, or measurement-term IDs:

## What This Supports

State the narrow public use of this change.

## What This Does Not Support

State what readers must not infer from this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `make validate`
- [ ] `make list-claim-sets` if claim sets changed
- [ ] `make list-evidence-gaps` if evidence gaps changed
- [ ] `make list-mechanism-extractions` if mechanism extractions changed
